ops.title: Layer 4 (live cache-economics rewriter) is DONE on main â€” the L0/L1/L2 engine, fail-open invariant, and the known follow-up.

ops.body:
cc-squash **Layer 4 â€” the live cache-economics rewriter â€” is COMPLETE on `main`** (built 2026-06-25 via 5 dynamic workflows; 260 Rust tests + Go suite green, clippy `-D warnings` clean, `/codex`-reviewed). Canonical as-built brief: cc-notes doc **bcd384b**; live-A/B runbook: cc-notes **31802a0**.

Shape: L0 (sync SSE `usage` tap â†’ `CacheState` + `failsafe` breaker), L1 (off-path `stage_next` summarizer staging keyed by content-address; gated on having squash candidates so trivial turns make no LLM call), L2 (sandboxed `intercept.rs` Interceptor: recompute geometry on live bytes â†’ `Controller::decide` â†’ pure `ccs-policy` splice + validity gate, fail-open). Retrieve via rmcp 1.8 on a panic-isolated 2nd listener. Cardinal invariant: any error/timeout/panic/gate-failure forwards the original byte-for-byte.

**Known follow-up (not a blocker):** the live loop currently squashes only single-message string-content segments; tool-pair/array-content (the bulk â€” tool output) fails-open/skipped. Target `tool_result` text blocks via the splice's existing `SegmentTarget::Block` to reclaim the bulk. Also unbuilt: the `ccs-eval` statistical substrate. Live A/B (Exp D, AB-oracle, retrieve-through-real-CC) is the user's to run.

**Update 2026-07-14:** the deterministic recode chain is complete and rewired to **Fâ†’Dâ†’Eâ†’Iâ†’Aâ†’Bâ†’Câ†’Jâ†’G** (blob-extract â†’ ANSI-strip â†’ whitespace â†’ markup-strip â†’ JSON-minify â†’ leanest-encoding â†’ dedup-backref â†’ head/tail â†’ seq-diff; G LAST so both diff sides are final rendered forms; every diff base renders verbatim). Passes G (seq-diff via `similar`, same-tool pairing) and I (HTML strip, quote-aware scanner) landed in `25142b7`; pass H (tools-array TOON) dropped â€” the API schema-validates `tools[]`. Passes A/B now run on **[[format-core]]** (cc-context's canonical crate, cargo git dep tag-pinned `v0.16.0`) â€” landed `f3326831`, fixing two latent bugs: f64 canonicalization corrupted wide number lexemes, and `needs_ref` could clobber the carried original (`carried_ref` threading, `f2fd108`). Pass A intentionally folds multi-doc NDJSON to one array. The on-path inline-lossless fast-lane (Dâ†’Eâ†’A on the provably-uncached tail, session commitment set, byte-stability invariant) was in flight at last update â€” check cc-notes task `dc50356`.

Next: **Layer 5** (transcript durability mirror) â€” see [[cc-squash-layer1-build]] lineage and the Â§7 Layer-4 "FOR THE PHASE-5 AGENT" pointers in `.claude/research/cc-squash-build-plan.md`.
